# Q 

2 

M 

COATING APPLICATOR

## Exterior / Accessories

### Dedicated soft coating applicator.

The Q²M Coating Applicator is designed specifically for ceramic coating application, offering a safe, precise and efficient way to apply coatings to all exterior surfaces. Its construction focuses on accuracy, comfort and reduced product waste during application.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/productmain_1700x1645px_coating_applicator_2021-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

COATING APPLICATOR

01
Choose the appropriate applicator size depending on the surface. 

02
Apply coating directly onto the suede or short nap side of the applicator. 

03
Spread evenly over the surface using overlapping motions. 

04
Monitor saturation and replace when needed. 

05
Dispose or clean according to the coating used. 

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What makes Q²M Coating Applicator different from regular sponge applicators? 

It features an inner liner that prevents coating from soaking into the foam, improving efficiency.

02
Why does it have two different surfaces? 

One side uses suede for precise coating application, the other uses short hair microfibre for controlled spreading.

03
Is it safe on all exterior surfaces? 

Yes, it has no sharp edges and is designed for safe use on all surfaces to be coated, inside and out.

04
Are different sizes available? 

Yes, it is available in Light and Large versions depending on the working area.

05
Is it suitable for professional use? 

Yes, it is designed for both enthusiasts and professional detailers.

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
